zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Douglas於1515年10月8日出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾莫頓時，她的父親Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton28歲，母親Lady Catherine Stewart26歲。她於1532年9月23日與James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran在蘇格蘭布特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1579年5月22日在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire波奧斯享年63歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾漢密爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Douglas于1515年10月8日出生在苏格兰度福利爾莫頓时，她的父亲Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton28岁，母亲Lady Catherine Stewart26岁。她于1532年9月23日与James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran在苏格兰布特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1579年5月22日在苏格兰Linlithgowshire波奧斯享年63岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰藍納可爾漢密爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Douglas was born on 8 October 1515, in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton, was 28 and her mother, Lady Catherine Stewart, was 26. She married James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran on 23 September 1532, in Bute, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 22 May 1579, in Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Douglas est née le 8 octobre 1515, à Morton, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Stewart, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran le 23 septembre 1532, à Bute, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mai 1579, à Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Douglas am 8. Oktober 1515 in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Catherine Stewart 26. Sie hat am 23. September 1532 in Bute, Scotland James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Mai 1579 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland und wurde in Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Douglas è nata il il 8 ottobre 1515 nel Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Catherine Stewart, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran il 23 settembre 1532, nel Bute, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 22 maggio 1579, nel Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Douglasが1515年10月8日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアモートンで生まれた時，父Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Mortonは28歳，母Lady Catherine Stewartは26歳であった。1532年9月23日にスコットランドブトでJames Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arranと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1579年5月22日にスコットランドLinlithgowshireボ'ネスで63歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアハミルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Douglas(이)가 1515년 10월 8일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Catherine Stewart(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1532년 9월 23일 스컷랜드 부트에서 James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1579년 5월 22일 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 보'네스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 함이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.8 October 1515–22 May 1579: 8 de outubro de 1515–22 de maio de 1579
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Douglas nasceu em 8 de outubro de 1515, em Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Stewart, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran em 23 de setembro de 1532, em Bute, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de maio de 1579, em Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Douglas родилась 8 октября 1515 г. в местности мортон, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Stewart, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran 23 сентября 1532 г. в местности бут, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 22 мая 1579 г. в местности бо'несс, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности хамилтон, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.8 October 1515–22 May 1579: 8 de octubre de 1515–22 de mayo de 1579
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Douglas nació el 8 de octubre de 1515, en Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine Stewart, tenía 26 años. Se casó con James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran el 23 de septiembre de 1532, en Bute, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1579, en Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Hamilton, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
